title: Remove project news/updates section and menu tab

requirements.text: Remove the ProjectNewsUpdates component from the main App.tsx layout

quotes: Just the section on the main page
remove the "project news/updates" section from the main page

acceptanceCriteria: The ProjectNewsUpdates section no longer appears on the main page
App.tsx no longer imports or renders the ProjectNewsUpdates component

requirements.text: Remove the 'News & Updates' navigation item from the TopNavigation dropdown menu

quotes: the tab in the drop down menu
the "news/updates" tab from the dropdown menu

acceptanceCriteria: The 'News & Updates' menu item no longer appears in the TopNavigation dropdown
All other menu items remain functional

constraints: Do not modify backend news update functionality or data structures
Preserve all other navigation menu items and their functionality
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths
nonGoals: Removing backend news update data or endpoints
Modifying the styling or layout of other sections
Changing the behavior of other navigation menu items
